title: Document embed.js and runtime adapters in ARCHITECTURE.md
description: Add formal module sections for src/runtime/embed.js and src/runtime/adapters/ (embed.js, sense.js, voice/openai-tts.js, voice/openai-whisper.js, voice/piper.js, voice/elevenlabs.js, voice/macos-say.js) to ARCHITECTURE.md. Currently only referenced in addendum notes, not as formal module sections. This is a 'partial' gap at 'major' severity.
